s_fedreg.title: NIST opens comments on incident reporting framework
s_fedreg.text:
NIST has opened a sixty day comment period on a generative model incident reporting framework for critical infrastructure operators.
Utilities and hospitals would file standardized reports within seventy two hours of a qualifying malfunction.
s_fedreg.previousText: NIST scheduled listening sessions on a generative model incident reporting framework for critical infrastructure operators.

s_eurlex.title: Code of practice timeline slips again
s_eurlex.text: Brussels now expects the AI Act code of practice to slip to August, with the Commission citing member-state wrangling and fresh industry lobbying over enforcement powers.

s_wire.title: Wire recap: final AI Act text keeps GPAI obligations
s_wire.text: The Parliament's final AI Act text keeps the general-purpose model obligations and stages compliance deadlines through August 2026.

s_court.title: CJEU expedites Data Act cloud-switching challenge
s_court.text: The CJEU agreed to hear the challenge to the Data Act cloud-switching provisions on an expedited schedule.

s_govinfo.title: GovInfo bulk data status
s_govinfo.text: GovInfo bulk data status page reports no new bulk data products this week.
